name: io.github.kosiakMD/artillery-mcp
description: MCP server for Artillery 2.x — full flags, Fargate, raw-text parser, project launcher (MIT)

environmentVariables.name: ARTILLERY_WORKDIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to project root (walk-up from here finds .artillery-mcp.config.json).

environmentVariables.name: ARTILLERY_CLOUD_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Artillery Cloud API key. Forwarded to artillery CLI when record=true.

environmentVariables.name: ARTILLERY_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to .artillery-mcp.config.json. Enables run_project_lt + counterBreakdown when set.

environmentVariables.name: ARTILLERY_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Max duration of a single artillery command. Default 1800000 (30min).

environmentVariables.name: ARTILLERY_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path inside container to config file.
